curiosityQuestion: Have you ever wondered how Dependency Injection works under the hood in Java?
whyExists: Dependency Injection is a core building block in Java. It solves fundamental structural and data manipulation problems that arise when building scalable applications.
realWorldAnalogy: Think of Dependency Injection like a well-designed component in an everyday physical system — organizing, transforming, and routing data efficiently.
simpleExplanation: At its foundation, Dependency Injection provides a clear, standardized way to execute logic in Java. This section explains every detail step by step from absolute zero.

stepByStepExecution.desc: Initialize and configure Dependency Injection parameters.
Return output and clean up execution scope.

examples.title: Basic Dependency Injection Example
examples.explanation: Demonstrates basic usage of Dependency Injection in Java.

namingRules.why: Adhering to standard naming conventions improves code readability.
